title: 51 Cal Leather Arc Gloves
shortDescription: Leather glove lined with Aramid fibre. Kevlar stitching. Shirred extended 16cm cuff
description: Leather glove lined with Aramid fibre. Kevlar stitching. Shirred extended 16cm cuff

features: Leather glove lined with Aramid fibre
Tan split cow leather palm 1.0 to 1.2mm with equivalent reinforcing.
Tan split cow leather back 1.0 to 1.2mm, shirred.
Yellow aramid knitted wrist cuff with tan split cow leather 0.8 to 1.0mm leather continuous pull
attributes.composition: 51 CAL/CM² arc rated leather gloves; High cut level D; High Abrasion Resistance; High resistance to snatch, tear, cut and heat; Waterproof; Multi-layer protection provides flexibility, comfort and excellent insulation.
